name: 德拉戈米尔 | 军刀
descriptionEn: A man of few words, Dragomir is disturbingly patient. Known for holding position for days at a time, some say he's one of Sabre's best marksman. Others say he's napping. No one really knows. No one left alive, anyway. ...I wait.
descriptionZh: 作为一个少言寡语的人，德拉戈米尔相当有耐心。他可以一次连着好几天坚守岗位，有人说他是军刀组织里最好的射手。其他人说，他是在打盹。没有人知道实情。因为没有人能获得离开。 ……我等着。
